breakdown: This PR fixes normalization of rewards_box payloads in streaming passthrough, adding fallback logic to map LLM-generated non-standard keys ('xp' -> 'xp_gained', 'gold_pieces' -> 'gold') before persistence. The fix is focused and targeted with good E2E test coverage. Main gaps are lack of explicit type annotations on the new function and missing docstrings. The error handling via coerce_int with defaults is appropriate for defensive data cleaning.
key_changes: Add normalize_rewards_box_for_ui() function to handle non-standard reward keys
Update _resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair to call normalize_rewards_box_for_ui on passthrough rewards
Add test file testing_mcp/test_streaming_passthrough_normalization.py with E2E validation
Pop redundant keys (xp, gold_pieces) after normalization to prevent duplicate data
